name: Retro Abyss : Last Wish Of The Game
short_description: Just when you think you've reached the end of the game, dive a little deeper. The further down you descend, the more ferocious the battles, the more valuable treasures, and the more intriguing the stories that await you...
detailed_description:
● New sensory slow-motion action for those thirsty for novel gameplay

Unlimited slow motion activates while aiming your skills.

Dodge enemy attacks like a dancer using slow motion, then unleash a devastating counter-attack.

● Endless unlockables and upgrades

Only those who reach the very end of the abyss will be able to learn the "ultimate skill" that can light up the entire abyss.

● Forge your own strategy with diverse combinations

Fight safely by parrying all enemy attacks, lay down skills like mines for a counter-hit, or engage in an all-out close-range brawl—you can create a vast variety of combat styles depending on your skill!

● Your grand coming-of-age ceremony beyond the fourth wall

This game is a poem dedicated to the nostalgic games that were with us in childhood, the adults who created them, you who have now followed in their footsteps to become an adult, and to all the adults and children who will continue to build more memories through games and life.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
